HP, which the abbreviation Hewlett-Packard, one the world’s major companies.
headquartered Palo Alto, California.
widely known for variety products encompassing both hardware and software.
HP, company has rich history computer technology.
Although the company born <hide>, wasn’t until much later the <hide>s that the company actually started delve into manufacturing minicomputers.
Laptops came lot later and the first was the HP-<hide> <hide>.
More products followed this lineup after this.
HP, present, offers two major laptop series.
These are the Pavilion and Envy series notebooks.
The Pavilion lineup was introduced <hide>, with the Envy lineup coming almost years later.
When comes India, does have huge presence the country.
The company easily ranks within the top five brands that are available India.
There huge network retail stores and even company showrooms where products are available.
Even popular ecommerce platforms offer discounts and offers for laptops.
Most students and professionals prefer HP, mainly because its reputation brand and also the quality products offered.
Many the laptops models are also reasonably priced, which means that they are largely affordable many buyers.
offers some the best laptops model

and their design really stands out among the crowd.
The Envy series laptops are more elegant than the Pavilion series.
This also because they are tad bit expensive.
Most the construction polycarbonate metal alloys.
This ensures that devices are light weight, but also strong enough stand permissible shocks.
You can expect the weight kilograms most.
Ultrabooks tend lot lighter though.
HP’s laptops have screen sizes from inches.
The technology used screen construction IPS LED.
They are also mostly HD/FHD terms resolution, thus offering clear viewing and graphics.
Many the devices also offer touchscreen functionality.
The keypad full sized one and offers good typing experience.
For devices that are priced highly, the keyboard often backlit one and makes typing easier.
Besides, touchpad that offers gesture based controls also very good have.
Many the laptops can also operated various modes, i.e.
hybrid models.
HP’s laptops come various different color options, although black, red, white and silver are the more commonly seen models.
Laptops from the house are known offer many different features.
start with, models come with both AMD and Intel processors.
The Intel range largely consists Core i<hide>/i<hide>/i<hide> presen

times, along with Celeron and Pentium Dual Core ones.
AMD processors the series are the other option.
Most models have inbuilt GPU rely discrete units from Nvidia AMD Radeon.
For memory, the laptops are equipped with <hide>GB RAM.
Storage capacities are also pretty high and range between <hide>GB and <hide>.<hide>TB.
host other options can found these laptops.
Most the devices are provided with Bang and Olufsen Dolby audio.
web camera can also found all the devices.
All laptops have Bluetooth and Wi-Fi connectivity.
Along with these, you can get USB ports, HDMI port, Ethernet port and <hide>.<hide>mm universal headphone jack.
The models also come with DVD writers.
The battery backup from laptops largely favorable.
